title: Mission for バレンタイン

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Have you decided on which chocolates to buy? I
can help you find something suitable if you
require help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to be checking out a Valentine's Day
event on my day off when Mihono Bourbon
suddenly approaches me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My apologies for failing to inform you of this
beforehand.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am currently carrying out my designated task of
acting as a guide for this event.
choice_data_list: So basically, this is your part-time gig?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Contractually speaking, that is correct. As for why
I am working here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, some of the event's workers are
running late due to traffic so Eishin Flash decided
to help out at one of her friend's shops.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon ran into her here and was asked
to help out too. She agreed as a way to pay Eishin
Flash back for her constant support.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This mission is imperative for gaining vital
knowledge and funds for Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Could I please receive your approval to engage in
part-time work exclusively today?
choice_data_list: Sure, I'll notify the academy for you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. I'm looking for some chocolate
truffles. Are there any that are exclusive to this
event?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Affirmative. Please state your preferred flavors.

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... A box with a variety of sweet flavors to
try out would be nice.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Search complete. I would recommend you peruse
the shop over there. Their truffles boast a velvety
ganache that melts into a milky flavor.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The adjacent shop offers a range of different
flavors. It is the only one selling fragrant and
succulent truffles containing real fruit juice.

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You sure know your stuff! Okay, I'll think I'll
check out that store!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her suggestions are surprisingly detailed. Had she
tried each shop's chocolates beforehand? I can
really feel her passion for Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff A
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry for being late! Thanks for covering me
last minute! I'll take over from here, so go ahead
and clock out!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. Mission complete. Best of luck.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your help today, Bourbon. You're a
real lifesaver.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
By the way, are you available after this? I wish to
treat you to some cake for your trouble. Of
course, your trainer is welcome to join us.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Cake? Thank you, but you need not provide me
further compensation, as I have already received
payment from the shop.
choice_data_list:
Then how about we simply enjoy some cake
together?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That... would be acceptable! Let the three of us
have cake together, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We go to the cafe nearby, and both Mihono
Bourbon and Eishin Flash order the special
Valentine's Day chocolate cake.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Although it's only January, Valentine's
decorations are already festooned all around. It's
nice we can start trying all kinds of chocolates so
early.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Every year around this time, a number of my
friends come to me to learn how to make
chocolates themselves.
choice_data_list:
They're already preparing for Valentine's Day,
huh?

They're already preparing for Valentine's Day,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes, those who are unaccustomed to making
desserts often need to practice several times to
get them right.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Flash, I have a question pertaining to homemade
chocolates that you may have the answer to.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Homemade chocolates are inferior to those
prepared by professional chocolatiers in every
way.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I believe they require something unique to set
them apart from store-bought ones, but what
would be appropriate to add?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
For something unique, I believe it would be
enough to pour your heart into the chocolate
while you make them.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Searching... No results found. How does one pour
their "heart" into chocolate?
choice_data_list:
I guess how much time you spend deciding on
the chocolates also counts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain how debating over the right chocolates
to give someone is a form of showing one's
"heart."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In addition, making sweets from scratch takes a
lot of time and effort. That in and of itself is
something the recipient is sure to appreciate.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Reconstructing hypothesis. The unique element
that sets homemade goods apart is the inclusion
of "heart," which consists of time and effort.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That's right. The thoughts and feelings poured
into homemade confections have an inherent
worth not present in store-bought goods.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I see. That was very educational.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I read an article the other day about homemade
goods which confused me, but this discussion has
dispelled my concerns.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I now have a deeper understanding of Valentine's
Day. Many thanks for your answers and advice.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Bourbon. You finished work? I'm done with
shopping.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Time to proceed with our post-work hang
out. Please wait a moment while I change.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Gotcha. Well, hey, you free too, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Nice! We got us a sponsor! All right, let's get
goin'! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Okay, here's all the chocolates you asked for.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan covers the table with various boxes
of chocolates from different stores and starts
opening all of them.
choice_data_list:
Are all these Valentine's Day presents for
people?

Are all these Valentine's Day presents for
people?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Nah, they're for us. Valentine's is like the best
time of year to try out fancy chocolates!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Jordan is able to collect a vast amount of
information on chocolate through her friend
network. This data is vital for selecting chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
As I wished to gain access to this information as
well, I suggested to Jordan we make a joint
purchase of a wide selection and share them.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon's strict when it comes to choosing
chocolates for friends, and I can try all kinds of
goodies while she's at it, so it's a win-win
situation!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Now then, let us begin sampling.
choice_data_list: Are you tasting them to see which ones to get?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. Firsthand experiences form the most
reliable data.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Verdict—delicious. Its caramel flavor should be compatible with most palates.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Omigosh! This one's so yummy! Here, you give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They offer me a rich-looking dark chocolate. I
bite into it, and my mouth floods with a lovely,
distinctive bitterness.
choice_data_list: It's good. I like that it's not too sweet.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Status—"surprise." So this is the type of chocolate
you prefer...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Popular chocolate choices typically contain
elevated levels of sugar. Your preference for
chocolate that lacks sweetness was not
anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
As I have not had much bitter chocolate before, I
must expand my palate at once. I shall start with
this bitter chocolate here.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Verdict—"satisfactory." Though bitter, I detect a hint of sweetness in it. I wonder how this one will compare?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, just wondering, but did you just want to
binge on chocolates or something?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Was Bourbon's "gift investigation" just a front?
Seeing her face stuffed with chocolates, I can't
help but think Tosen Jordan is onto something.
